critic_notes: Baustein INF.9: 3 questions reviewed. 2 pass, 1 flag, 0 fail. 1 flag(s) for cosmetic quote artifacts — PDF-to-markdown line-wrap hyphens that the quote spans, or bulleted-list content flattened into a prose sentence; content remains verbatim under aggressive normalization. No factual errors or unsupported correct answers were found; all correct answers trace to Anforderungen in the Baustein and distractors are unambiguously wrong.

issues.detail: Fragment flattens a bulleted list from the source (bullets replaced by commas). Content is verbatim after dropping bullet markers. Example: 'Mindestens MUSS geregelt werden: unter welchen Arbeitsplatzbedingungen schützenswerte Informationen '
